title: Inside Block Notifier
description: Verifies whether the entity is inside any of the listed blocks.

block_list.title: Block List
block_list.description:
List of blocks, with certain block states, that we are monitoring to see if the entity is inside.

Properties:
• block ({ name, states })
• entered_block_event
• exited_block_event

Sample values:
• boat: [{"block":{"name":"minecraft:bubble_column","st...

block.title: Block
block.description:
The block to monitor, including name and optional states.

Properties:
• name (string)
• states

defaultSnippets.label: Block
defaultSnippets.description: The block to monitor, including name and optional states.

entered_block_event.title: Entered Block Event
entered_block_event.description: Event to fire when the entity enters the block.

exited_block_event.title: Exited Block Event
exited_block_event.description: Event to fire when the entity exits the block.
